positive: A stylized, geometric silhouette of a celestial whale swimming through a bioluminescent cosmic ocean. The whale has delicate, crystalline fins and ethereal, starry patterns forming its body. The composition is centered and symmetrical, featuring strong contrast between deep midnight blues, vibrant turquoise glow, and points of electric gold light. The background should mimic a modern mandala pattern infused with nebulae textures, giving it a clean, graphic, and wearable look. Clean lines, high contrast, vector art feel, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, artifact, text, watermark, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, signature, dirty, messy, realistic photography, depth of field
